eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Kenosha, WI; at 08:22 AM ON APR 24, 2026 Effective until 08:37 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: To satisfy FEMA testing, this is a Required Weekly Test from the Kenosha Sheriff's Division of Emergency Management. This is only a TEST NO ACTION NEEDED. This is only a TEST
